chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1067 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 420/24 2.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 None present for the petitioners. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Naheed Akhtar, APG a/w SIP Zafar Ali, I.O of the case. **** None is present for the petitioners. However, the Investigating Officer has filed a statement along with order dated 11.12.2024 passed by the concerned Magistrate, whereby the report under section 173 CrPC recommending disposal of FIR in question in “C” Class, has been approved. Accordingly, the instant petition, having become infructuous, is hereby disposed of along with the listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
